headline: Google Ads campaign fully configured for agency reporting keywords ($20/day) — ready for deployment post-OAuth reset
highlights: ✅ 18 keywords identified: 5 broad match (high intent), 10 phrase match (precision), 3 negative keywords
✅ 3 ad copy variants for A/B testing: Time Savings, Accuracy, Visualization
✅ Landing page integration: UTM parameters configured for conversion attribution
✅ Conversion tracking: Primary goal (form submission), secondary goals (page view, trial account created)
✅ Bid strategy: Manual CPC ($2.25 default, $3.50 max)
✅ Performance monitoring: Daily/weekly/monthly schedule with optimization rules
⚠️ OAuth token issue identified (400 refresh error) — resolution procedures documented in Deployment Guide Part 1
📋 4 comprehensive documents created: Strategy, Config, Deployment Guide, Execution Summary

next_actions.label: Reset Google Ads OAuth Token
next_actions.task_template: Follow Part 1 of Deployment Guide to reset expired OAuth credential (5-10 minutes)

next_actions.label: Execute Campaign Deployment
next_actions.task_template: Follow Part 3 of Deployment Guide to create campaign, ad group, keywords, ads, and conversion tracking (20-30 minutes post-OAuth fix)

next_actions.label: Verify Campaign Launch
next_actions.task_template: Follow Part 4 of Deployment Guide to verify impressions/clicks/conversions within 24 hours of launch

next_actions.label: Begin Daily Monitoring
next_actions.task_template: Execute daily 5-minute check of campaign status, impressions, cost pacing, and conversion tracking per Part 6 schedule

next_actions.label: Analyze Monthly Performance
next_actions.task_template: At day 30, calculate CPA vs. $50 target, identify winning ad variant, and determine scaling strategy (increase budget if CPA ≤ $40)
